content: Hi, I'm Hayden, and I'm a Yoga Instructor and Wellness Coach. I recently adopted a golden retriever named Willow from a shelter, and she's been a great addition to my life.
Congratulations on the new furry family member! How's the adjustment been to having a dog?
It's been great! Willow is such a sweet girl, and she loves going on runs with me. I've actually started training for a marathon, and she's been my trusty running buddy.
That's wonderful! It's great that you have a workout partner. What inspired you to become a Yoga Instructor and Wellness Coach?
I've always been passionate about health and wellness, and I wanted to help others achieve their goals. I've been practicing yoga for over 10 years, and it's had a huge impact on my life.
I love listening to podcasts and trying out new recipes in my free time. My friend, Sophia, is actually a great cook and has been teaching me some new techniques.
That sounds like a great way to relax! What's your favorite type of podcast to listen to?
I love listening to true crime podcasts and comedy shows. They're always so engaging and entertaining. I've actually been listening to a lot of podcasts while I'm out on walks with Willow.
That's great! It's wonderful that you have a dog to keep you company. Have you thought about starting a family of your own?
I've thought about it, but I'm not sure yet. I'm focusing on my career and enjoying my time with Willow for now. We do love spending time with our friends and their kids, though.
That's understandable. It's great that you have a strong support system. What's the most important thing to you in your relationships with your friends and family?
I think it's just being able to trust and support each other. We've had some tough times, but we always manage to come out stronger on the other side.
That's great to hear. It's clear that you value your relationships. Have you thought about taking a break from your work to travel or explore new places?
Actually, I'm planning a trip to Costa Rica next year to study yoga and wellness. It's a dream come true for me as a Yoga Instructor.
That sounds like an incredible opportunity! I'm sure you'll learn so much from the experience. What are you most looking forward to about the trip?
I'm excited to learn from the local experts and try some of the local cuisine. I'm also looking forward to spending some time in nature and practicing yoga outdoors.
That sounds wonderful. I'm sure you'll have a great time. Don't forget to take some time to relax and enjoy the beautiful scenery.
I will, thanks for the reminder! I'm actually planning to take a few days off from work in April to focus on my own wellness and self-care.
That's great to hear. It's so important to prioritize your own well-being. I hope you have a wonderful time in Costa Rica and that it's a great opportunity for you to relax and recharge.
